lenses.title: Organizational Flow
lenses.description: Movement of resources, information, and work.

lenses.title: Transformation
lenses.description: Conversion of capabilities into organizational manifestations.

lenses.title: Development
lenses.description: Evolution of organizational capability over time.

observation.purpose: Observe the complete organizational field of SpaceX using calibrated Grand Eye mechanics.
observation.boundary: Persistent organizations and recurring organizational relationships within SpaceX.
questions: How do capabilities relate to one another?
What recurring organizational patterns are observed?
observation.summary: SpaceX reconstructs as an integrated organizational ecosystem whose persistent capabilities interact through recurring organizational relationships rather than isolated departments.
